{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152304CCF5AF2A8ABE6C95865D"}"},"total":287},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429926789209785112","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，情节很合理，而且逻辑能自洽。很能吸引人的兴趣，能让人沉迷进去。作者加油啊，这本算是谍战文里写的好的了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729917418,"group_id":"7399543067272809534","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"史同","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyYFs6qmihGj7RV3lnDbEkF0VgejRq1p0K+p/+Pg3BxB","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e9f9d793cc84693810dd5442f9321ad~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791383&x-signature=eSm9XyPyCqiuszVXXxbK50ekwVY%3D","user_id":"2977952230022652","user_name":"长安不起风CA"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2977952230022652","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399543067272809534","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，死囚林琛被军统特务头子戴春风强行替身日谍，执行百死无生的”邮包”计划，成了一名给小日子送假情报的死间。
就在绝望之时，他发现能收到死亡情报，于是……
戴老板：他是我又爱又恨的死囚；
徐老板：我的王牌全在保护他一个，他的价值能抵一个集团军；
特高课：他是帝国最优秀的特勤，他是潜伏界的MVP；
宪兵司令部：他是司令官阁下的弟弟，亲的那种，我们都叫他散财童子；
军情六处：他绝对是情报界的英伦绅士，女王将授予他‘维多利亚十字勋章’，表彰他的卓越贡献；
安全总局：他是红星勋章的获得者，他的贡献比得上拉姆扎小组；
